hooks.command: bash -lc 'repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; repo_script="$repo_root/.codex/hooks/stop-git-header-json.sh"; home_script="$HOME/.codex/hooks/stop-git-header-json.sh"; if [ -x "$repo_script" ]; then exec "$repo_script"; elif [ -x "$home_script" ]; then exec "$home_script"; else echo "Missing stop-git-header-json.sh (checked $repo_script and $home_script)" >&2; exit 1; fi'
